training_status: highly active, consistent lifting splits, cardio, nutrition and recovery for ~2 years

compounds.frequency: weekly (titrating to every 5 days when tolerance increases)

benefits.description: Allowed OP to eat like a robot, perfectly hit macros every day without going to bed hungry; eliminated food noise
Cured ongoing IBS issues; able to expand food variety without IBS flare-ups
Got shredded for 40th birthday; maintained lean physique; able to maintain calorie deficit
Improved sleep; previously had restless sleep due to carb cravings/food noise

side_effects.description: Each titration increment comes on strong the first few days; nausea if dose too high leading to inability to eat
Tolerance buildup requiring dose escalation every 4-6 weeks; began pinning every 5 days instead of 7 before bumping dose

protocol_notes: Started Tirz at 2.5mg, titrating up by 2.5mg increments each time it became ineffective (every 4-6 weeks), reaching 15mg over ~12 months. On TRT+ protocol (testosterone 160mg, primobolan 60mg). Also uses ipamorelin/mod-GRF, tadalafil, creatine. Not prescribed; purchased online. Has taken 2-3 week breaks from Tirz since starting. Height 5'9". Changed diet ~2 years ago after naturopath visit and ALCAT test. Quit alcohol prior to starting Tirz.
